languages.text: "Пусть 32-ой полк переходит в полномасштабную атаку на врага при первой же возможности. Пора положить конец ксенозаразе".
"Have the 32nd Regiment move into a full-scale attack on the enemy at the earliest opportunity. It is time to put an end to this xenoscourge."
languages.original_text: "Пусть 32-ой полк переходит в полномасштабную атаку на врага при первой же возможности. Пора положить конец ксенозаразе".

traits.locale_text: "Have the 32nd Regiment move into a full-scale attack on the enemy at the earliest opportunity. It is time to put an end to this xenoscourge."
"Have the 32nd Regiment move into a full-scale attack on the enemy at the earliest opportunity. It is time to put an end to this xenoscourge."
"Have the 32nd Regiment move into a full-scale attack on the enemy at the earliest opportunity. It is time to put an end to this xenoscourge."

languages.text: 「第32連隊は、敵に大規模な攻撃を仕掛けろ。この異星生物の脅威に終止符を打つ時だ」
languages.original_text: "Have the 32nd Regiment move into a full-scale attack on the enemy at the earliest opportunity. It is time to put an end to this xenoscourge."

traits.locale_text: 「第32連隊は、敵に大規模な攻撃を仕掛けろ。この異星生物の脅威に終止符を打つ時だ。」

languages.text: «Que el 32.º regimiento organice un ataque total contra el enemigo en cuanto pueda. Es hora de poner fin al azote de estos xenos».
languages.original_text: "Have the 32nd Regiment move into a full-scale attack on the enemy at the earliest opportunity. It is time to put an end to this xenoscourge."

traits.locale_text: «Que el 32.º regimiento organice un ataque total contra el enemigo en cuanto pueda. Es hora de poner fin al azote de estos xenos».

languages.text: “命令第32团立即发起全面进攻，是时候终结这场异形灾祸了。”
languages.original_text: "Have the 32nd Regiment move into a full-scale attack on the enemy at the earliest opportunity. It is time to put an end to this xenoscourge."

traits.locale_text: “命令第32团立即发起全面进攻，是时候终结这场异形灾祸了。”

languages.text: "Das 32. Regiment soll bei der ersten sich bietenden Gelegenheit zum Angriff übergehen. Es wird Zeit, dieser Xenoplage ein Ende zu machen."
languages.original_text: "Have the 32nd Regiment move into a full-scale attack on the enemy at the earliest opportunity. It is time to put an end to this xenoscourge."

traits.locale_text: "Das 32. Regiment soll bei der ersten sich bietenden Gelegenheit zum Angriff übergehen. Es wird Zeit, dieser Xenoplage ein Ende zu machen."

languages.text: "32. Alay'ın ilk fırsatta düşmana topyekûn saldırıya geçmesi gerek. Bu zeno belasına bir son vermenin zamanı geldi."
languages.original_text: "Have the 32nd Regiment move into a full-scale attack on the enemy at the earliest opportunity. It is time to put an end to this xenoscourge."

traits.locale_text: "32. Alay'ın ilk fırsatta düşmana topyekûn saldırıya geçmesi gerek. Bu zeno belasına bir son vermenin zamanı geldi."

languages.text: « Que le 32e régiment lance une attaque de grande ampleur contre l'ennemi à la première occasion. Il est temps d'anéantir ce fléau xénos ! »
languages.original_text: "Have the 32nd Regiment move into a full-scale attack on the enemy at the earliest opportunity. It is time to put an end to this xenoscourge."

traits.locale_text: « Que le 32e régiment lance une attaque de grande ampleur contre l'ennemi à la première occasion. Il est temps d'anéantir ce fléau xénos ! »
